phrases.text_local: Podes indicar um restaurante de comida típica perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-dihsh een-dee-KAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DIH koo-MEE-duh TEE-pee-kuh PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à receção ou ao balcão de informações do museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH reh-sih-SOWN OHW OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the reception or the museum information desk.

responses.english: Go to the reception or the museum information desk.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH reh-sih-SOWN OHW OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.local: Dirija-se à receção ou ao balcão de informações do museu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman ruins are
phrases.cultural_note: The Roman ruins are a permanent exhibit in the museum, but avoid giving specific floor or room details not in stable facts.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a consigna de casacos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH koong-SEEG-nuh DIH kuh-ZAH-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors are expected to store heavy outerwear to protect archaeological displays.

likely_response.local: Consulte o rececionista para saber onde fica a consigna de casacos.
likely_response.pronunciation: koong-SOOW-tih AW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh PUH-ruh suh-BEHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH koong-SEEG-nuh DIH kuh-ZAH-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the receptionist where the cloakroom is.

responses.english: Ask the receptionist where the cloakroom is.
responses.phonetic: koong-SOOW-tih AW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh PUH-ruh suh-BEHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH koong-SEEG-nuh DIH kuh-ZAH-koosh.
responses.local: Consulte o rececionista para saber onde fica a consigna de casacos.

phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde posso comprar bilhetes?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Greet with 'Bom dia' (good day) as a polite opening. Ticket counters are typically located at the main entrance in Portuguese museums.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the sarcophagus room is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a sala dos sarcófagos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH SAH-luh DOOSH suh-ruh-KAW-fuh-goosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The collection features early Christian stone coffins excavated in Braga.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção ou siga as placas para a Sala dos Sarcófagos.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH suh-ruh-KAW-fuh-goosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at reception or follow the signs to the Sarcophagus Room.

responses.english: Ask at reception or follow the signs to the Sarcophagus Room.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH suh-ruh-KAW-fuh-goosh.
responses.local: Pergunte na receção ou siga as placas para a Sala dos Sarcófagos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to collect audio guides
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde posso levantar o áudio-guia?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih PAW-soo leh-vahnng-TAHR AW OW-deeoo-GEEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are collected at a designated counter, usually near the ticket desk. Always ask politely.

likely_response.local: Ao lado da bilheteira, no balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, NOO bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the ticket office, at the counter.

responses.english: Next to the ticket office, at the counter.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, NOO bahl-KOWN.
responses.local: Ao lado da bilheteira, no balcão.
